programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Un caso se vuelve personal para García cuando la UAC investiga la desaparición de una mujer, en su grupo de apoyo a sobrevivientes, cuya hija desapareció hace siete años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un pequeño grupo de jóvenes de la academia militar comete un suicidio en masa, la UAC tiene que ver las verdaderas razones detrás de sus actos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga una serie de brutales asesinatos en Filadelfia, lo que los lleva hasta un escenario donde se practica boxeo en busca del asesino. Por otra parte, Hotch conoce a una atractiva atleta, ya que ambos están entrenando para un triatlón.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS busca al responsable de un asesino a sueldo que apunta a un Teniente Comandante de la Armada, mientras Abby descubre secretos familiares tras pruebas para donar un riñón.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un oficial de la guardia costera en un barco abandonado y encuentra a una familia libanesa buscando asilo en EE. UU. Mientras tanto, Tony y McGee buscan la pareja perfecta para Gibbs.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un caso de NCIS pasa de muerte accidental a asesinato cuando la evidencia revela que un teniente de la Armada murió por sobrehidratación forzada. Mientras tanto, Gibbs conoce a la nueva pareja sentimental de Ducky.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS busca respuestas cuando el actual esposo de la exesposa de Gibbs y Fornell es secuestrado de manera sospechosa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Buen policía, mal policía
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una anciana por una bala perdida. Mientras, Frank es ridiculizado por disciplinar a un policía irrespetuoso y Erin ayuda a su detective Anthony.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Por la comunidad
programme.desc: Erin y Anthony intentan evitar la deportación de la activista comunitaria Coryna Garza (Judy Reyes), quien no es ciudadana, y Frank debe decidir si el NYPD participará en la redada de alto perfil de los Marshals de EE. UU. contra una pandilla local.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El delator
programme.desc: Mientras Frank se enfrenta a un denunciante de la policía de Nueva York que afirma tener pruebas de abuso de poder en la organización, Danny y Báez investigan el caso de una mujer que fue atropellada por un coche en circunstancias sospechosas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Culpable por asociación
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo clave en el caso de Danny es asesinado justo antes de testificar, Erin enfurece a Danny al pedirle ayuda a Anthony (Steve Schrippa) para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga una serie de brutales asesinatos en Filadelfia, lo que los lleva hasta un escenario donde se practica boxeo en busca del asesino. Por otra parte, Hotch conoce a una atractiva atleta, ya que ambos están entrenando para un triatlón.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo viaja a San Francisco cuando una serie de asesinatos lleva a creer que El asesino del Zodíaco podría haber regresado. Mientras tanto, Reid reflexiona si podría hacer algo más con sus habilidades de genio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo es llamado para buscar a un violador en serie de Houston conocido como El pianista, que ha vuelto y está atacando a sus víctimas anteriores. Por otra parte, Prentiss comienza un tratamiento por la experiencia traumática causada por Ian Doyle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seasoned corporal gives some advice to a young man with a new motorcycle. A woman’s impatience lands her in hot water when she’s pulled over for tailgating. Officers give a driver multiple chances to come clean to no avail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman makes a desperate attempt to frame her friend right in front of deputies. A driver’s assortment of containers raises some questions. A man in possession of a stolen truck insists that his friend is the one at fault.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Fleeing suspects risk their safety by hiding in a dangerous swamp. For one driver, a broken truck turns out to be the start of a very long list of problems. Deputies sympathize with a woman who’s been put through the wringer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man has a hard time making his case when a bag of illicit items has his name on it. A talkative driver tells officers a long story with conflicting details. A couple calls for help when they find an alligator in their yard.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are dumbfounded when a man tries to talk them into taking him to jail. Sparks fly when a driver tries to take his truck on the freeway with only two wheels. Deputies are on guard when they approach a belligerent man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A generous boyfriend steps in to prevent his girlfriend from going to jail. Officers save a kitten who wants to hide in a dangerous place. A man says he’s been driving a stolen truck for one day, but he’s off by a few months.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young couple spends too much time arguing and not enough time paying attention to the road. An officer uses his surefire trick to catch someone in a lie. A chatty driver racks up a slew of charges in front of his own house.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect in possession of a stolen truck leads everyone on a chase through some bumpy terrain. Gas station employees call police when they spot a couple asleep at the pump. A man familiar to deputies shows them he can change.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A personalized keychain casts doubt on a man’s flimsy story. A cyclist throws something behind his back as soon as deputies roll up. A laid-back driver’s estimation of what’s in his car is off by a couple trash bags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An alleged burglar claims his sack full of money is a gift from his grandma. The discovery of a pink bandana leads deputies to question a suspect’s story. A deputy attempts to get a man to cool off after a fight with his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy questions a driver about why his broken-down car looks like it’s been in an accident. Obstacle after obstacle prevents a woman from fixing her janky vehicle. A young man looking for a fresh start falls on hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two men acting strangely in a gas station draw the suspicion of an employee. Deputies arrest a man for creating an unsafe environment for his younger brother. Mom calls the cops when her daughter throws water on her.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The rough terrain of a high-speed pursuit proves both dangerous and useful for deputies. Police find more than a stolen air conditioner in the trunk of a messy van. A confused man loses track of what’s in his pockets.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway biker makes multiple clumsy attempts to slip away from deputies. A shady figure has a curious method of trying to get a drink of water. A young woman starts making unwise choices when her family leaves town.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in possession of a stolen car explains his unique nickname to deputies. Police go to the same house twice in under 30 minutes to sort out a messy marital spat. A mom with multiple priors is caught in a bind.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to level with a man who’s struggled with addiction for a decade. Security guards at an aquarium warn officers about a man with a gun. A masked-up cyclist has no luck out-pedaling the officer on his tail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After leading police on a slow pursuit, a sharply-dressed driver has a heated talk with another deputy. In spite of her tears, police unravel a woman’s lies one-by-one. A traditionally bad omen turns into good luck for a couple.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop turns dangerous when a driver takes off with a deputy halfway inside the vehicle. Recent changes in the law and a forthright attitude help a man avoid jail time. A neighborhood man gives motorists a scare.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A biker with a history of stealing vehicles doesn’t know how to drive his motorcycle. A man in- between jobs takes up a sketchy method of earning money. Deputies strongly question the legitimacy of a man’s work van.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A business owner flags down officers when an erratic man starts climbing on his car. Unusual circumstances allow officers to cut a driver some slack for being honest. A man forgets to return a car after running errands.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect on the run makes a dangerous decision when he finds himself cornered. An unsuspecting driver gets more than she bargained for when she gives an old friend a lift. A friendly woman has a thing for cowboys.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teenager who ran away from home tries running from the cops too. A man set a date to turn his life around, but deputies ask him to start earlier. A man found with hundreds of sunglasses claims he was going to give them away.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to put an end to a dangerous stolen vehicle pursuit. An alleged mechanic says he has permission to drive a semi-truck — the owner says otherwise. A couple stops a woman from driving away in their car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When the cuffs come out, an emotional cyclist gives deputies the runaround. A boyfriend’s honesty saves his girlfriend from going to jail on her birthday. Police investigate a case of road rage involving a possible gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway cyclist dips into a house to catch his breath. A deputy tries to cut a man some slack despite his mistakes. The owners of an empty house call the police when they hear someone else inside.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A pair of suspects on the run pretend they were busy napping. A man reaches for something in his pocket, but denies knowing what it is. A family calls the police after their roommate brandishes a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to cut a guy some slack after his relationship troubles got out of hand. A teenager gets a serious lesson in not drinking while underage. A couple is forced to take a raincheck on their wedding day.

programme.title: CSI

programme.desc: When an FBI agent who was working undercover is found brutally murdered, the CSI team is called in to assist the victim's partner in finding the killer.

programme.desc: Langston and Nick are called to investigate a murder at a fast food restaurant and have quite a task ahead of them when they discover that much of the evidence is coated in cooking oil.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While Langston testifies in the trial of a respected Congressman, new evidence sends the CSIs back to the lab to reopen the investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to three different crime scenes in one night that are seemingly unrelated, but each case's forensic evidence reveals a common link.

programme.desc: A brutal motorcycle gang murder takes place in a biker bar.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Ella está encantada
programme.desc: Anne Hathaway, ganadora de un Oscar, protagoniza un inolvidable cuento de hadas moderno en el que una muchacha recibe el don de la obediencia de su hada madrina. Una asombrosa aventura mágica repleta de coloridos personajes, música, ingenio y fantasía.

programme.title: Como si fuera cierto
programme.desc: David Abbott, un arquitecto solitario, encuentra un increíble apartamento en San Francisco, solo para descubrir que está embrujado por el espíritu del inquilino anterior, Elizabeth Masterson, una doctora superdotada que está en coma.

programme.title: Juegos del corazón
programme.desc: Una pareja de casados que renovarán sus votos, una mujer enfocada en su carrera perseguida por un encantador extraño, y una joven pareja que se conoce en un club de LA. Una comedia romántica sobre parejas modernas que se unen de maneras inesperadas.

programme.title: Kate And Leopold ES
programme.desc: Meg Ryan y Hugh Jackman son amantes que descubren que la pasión y la cortesía nunca están fuera de moda, cuando los une un quiebre en el tiempo. Los viajes en el tiempo con toques de comedia romántica nunca han sido tan encantadores.

programme.title: Novios por navidad
programme.desc: La organizadora de eventos Valeria, traicionada por su amiga Tere que le robó a su prometido, finge un romance con Camilo para vengarse, lo que desemboca en una inesperada historia de amor navideña.

programme.title: Hechizo de luna
programme.desc: Cher (en una actuación ganadora del Oscar) como una viuda que está lista para volver a casarse. Pero cuando se enamora del hermano de su prometido (Nicolas Cage), surge una complicación romántica digna de una de las mejores comedias.

programme.title: Sirenas
programme.desc: Una joven se ve atrapada en una guerra emocional, al lidiar con su primer amor y una madre poco convencional.

programme.title: A Walk On The Moon
programme.desc: En el verano de 1969, Pearl (Diane Lane) conoce a un extraño sensual y de espíritu libre (Viggo Mortensen), durante unas tediosas vacaciones familiares más con su esposo. Así que hará lo impensable: tener un intrépido y apasionado amorío.

programme.title: Capitan de rurales
programme.desc: El joven capitán de un grupo conocido como los rurales es perseguido por el gobierno mexicano por defender los derechos de los campesinos de las injusticias, pero en esta odisea contará con el apoyo del pueblo.

programme.title: Duelo de pistoleros
programme.desc: El duelo por ser el mejor en la comarca, duelo por ser quien mande en ese sitio pero sobre todo duelo por tan lindas mujeres.

programme.title: La marca de Satanás
programme.desc: Un brutal asesinato conmociona a los habitantes de un pequeño pueblo rural; pero las cosas apenas comienzan cuando varias fuerzas malignas comienzan a plagar la ciudad.

programme.title: Mississippi en llamas
programme.desc: Dos agentes del FBI de aspecto muy diferente llegan a Mississippi para investigar la desaparición de algunos defensores de los derechos civiles.

programme.title: Llega un jinete libre y salvaje
programme.desc: En el Viejo Oeste de los años 40, dos ganaderos de poca monta se alían para hacer frente a los estragos de un terrateniente despiadado que pretende ampliar su imperio a cualquier precio. Protagonizada por Jane Fonda, James Caan y Jason Robards.

programme.title: Cuidado con el amor
programme.desc: Pedro, con la ayuda de dos mejores amigos de su padre busca un tesoro enterrado en una hacienda colonial. Elsa y su madre quieren impedirlo. Al fin el amor interviene y Pedro y Elsa comparten la fortuna y su felicidad.

programme.title: Los Dos Rivales
programme.desc: Los Treviño y Los Guereña mantienen una rivalidad originada muchos años atrás. Por necesidad de dinero, el heredero de los Treviño, y la heredera de los Guereña, tienen que disfrazarse usando ropa del sexo opuesto para proteger y vender sus ranchos.

programme.title: Suburbicon
programme.desc: Del director George Clooney, Suburbicon es el lugar perfecto para Gardner Lodge (Matt Damon) y su familia. Pero esa tranquilidad oculta una realidad perturbadora, y Gardner deberá navegar por el submundo de traición, engaño y violencia de la ciudad.

programme.title: El silencio de los inocentes
programme.desc: Un psicópata llamado Buffalo Bill está asesinando mujeres, por lo que el FBI envía a la agente Clarice Starling a entrevistar a un prisionero demente: el Dr. Hannibal Lecter, un psiquiatra caníbal que tiene una fascinación por asesinar.

programme.title: Monster: asesina en serie
programme.desc: Basada en la vida de Aileen Wuornos, una prostituta de Daytona Beach que se convirtió en asesina en serie.

programme.title: Muerte en Buenos Aires
programme.desc: Muerte en Buenos Aires, el mayor éxito del año en su Argentina natal, es un apasionante thriller policial sobre la corrupción, la paranoia y la vida gay secreta de la élite adinerada de Buenos Aires durante los políticamente tumultuosos años ochenta.

programme.title: 11 Grados de Culpa
programme.desc: 11 ex-compañeros de colegio disfrutan de una opulenta celebración y son sorprendidos por la inesperada visita de Mónica que es asesinada en los jardines de la casa creando una investigación.

programme.title: Abuso de poder
programme.desc: Cuatro policías agresivos y deshonestos investigan el asesinato de una joven. Cuando descubren que estaba vinculada emocionalmente con su jefe, un destacado general del ejército estadounidense, intentan encubrir el asesinato.

programme.title: El hijo de Dios
programme.desc: La historia de la vida de Jesús se cuenta desde su humilde nacimiento a través de sus enseñanzas, crucifixión y resurrección final.

programme.title: Evelyn (ESP)
programme.desc: Son tiempos difíciles en Dublín, Irlanda. Pero nadie lo tiene más difícil que Desmond Doyle cuando su esposa se marcha y el gobierno decide mandar a su amada hija Evelyn y sus otros dos hijos jóvenes a un orfanato.

programme.title: Querido Dios
programme.desc: Greg Kinnear protagoniza en este espíritu-levantador sobre un estafador que va de nada bueno al hacer el bien.

programme.title: Tan distinto como yo
programme.desc: Del éxito de ventas del NY Times llega una historia inspiradora y verdadera sobre dos hombres de orígenes radicalmente opuestos, que desarrollan un sorprendente vínculo que los llevará al viaje más notable de sus vidas y forjará una amistad eterna.

programme.title: Live in Peru
programme.desc: El percusionista Tony Succar actúa en vivo en Perú con una banda de 40 músicos y una formación llena de estrellas.

programme.title: Abajo en el delta
programme.desc: En el debut como directora de Maya Angelou, una afligida madre soltera pasa un verano en la casa familiar de campo en Misisipi, y aprende a revertir el rumbo de su vida en una historia inspiradora sobre la familia, la comunidad y la amistad.

programme.title: Equilibrium
programme.desc: En el futuro, la humanidad ha prohibido cosas que producen emociones como la literatura, la música y el arte, para mantenerlo, un grupo especial de policías eliminará a los transgresores. Christian Bale protagoniza esta increíble película de acción.

programme.title: Ejecutor
programme.desc: Despedido hace algún tiempo del FBI, Mark Kaminsky se pone en contacto con su anterior jefe, Shannon, cuyo hijo ha sido asesinado. Decidido a encontrar al asesino, Shannon necesita la ayuda de Kaminsky y se ofrece a reincorporarlo si tiene éxito.

programme.title: Atrapen al gringo
programme.desc: Un criminal de carrera, capturado por las autoridades mexicanas, es enviado a una prisión de alta seguridad donde aprende a sobrevivir con la ayuda de un niño

programme.title: Aguas profundas
programme.desc: Kate (Halle Berry) acepta la lucrativa oportunidad de guiar a un empresario millonario en busca de emociones, por medio del buceo con tiburones en las más peligrosas aguas... fuera de la jaula.

programme.title: Diablo
programme.desc: Un joven veterano de la guerra civil se ve obligado a emprender un viaje desesperado para salvar a su esposa secuestrada. Arriesgándolo todo para rescatar a la mujer que ama, este western lleno de acción toma y giros.

programme.title: Kickboxer contrataque
programme.desc: Cuando el luchador de MMA Kurt Sloane se ve obligado a participar en un combate a muerte con un asesino de 400 libras, busca la ayuda del legendario Maestro Durand (Jean-Claude Van Damme) y del luchador de prisión Briggs (Mike Tyson) para sobrevivir

programme.title: Contrarreloj
programme.desc: Un ex ladrón busca desesperadamente a su hija que ha sido secuestrada y encerrada en el maletero de un taxi. Protagonizada por Nicolas Cage y Malin Akerman.

programme.title: Inmersión letal
programme.desc: Paul Walker y Jessica Alba esperan pasar unos momentos inolvidables buceando, pero se meten en un lío con un traficante cuando encuentran la carga ilícita de un avión hundido en este thriller submarino lleno de acción y sorpresas.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Dos aventureros ávidos de emociones se cruzan con una hermosa doctora y van en busca del mayor tesoro, que se cobra las vidas de todos los que lo buscan.

programme.title: Lo imposible
programme.desc: Nominada al Oscar (Mejor Actriz, Naomi Watts), este apasionante drama cuenta la increíble historia real de la supervivencia de una familia frente a probabilidades imposibles.

programme.title: Inmersión letal
programme.desc: Paul Walker y Jessica Alba esperan pasar unos momentos inolvidables buceando, pero se meten en un lío con un traficante cuando encuentran la carga ilícita de un avión hundido en este thriller submarino lleno de acción y sorpresas.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Dos aventureros ávidos de emociones se cruzan con una hermosa doctora y van en busca del mayor tesoro, que se cobra las vidas de todos los que lo buscan.

programme.title: Jimmy Neutrón: El niño genio
programme.desc: Durante la noche, los extraterrestres llegan a la tierra en sus naves espaciales y secuestran a todos los padres del pueblo de Jimmy, Retroville. Jimmy debe rescatar a los padres secuestrados.

programme.title: La cueva encantada
programme.desc: La película cuenta una historia sobre la esperanza, pero también sobre la codicia humana. Un emocionante cuento de hadas lleno de suspenso, arrastra al espectador a las profundidades de una misteriosa cueva hasta que no quiere salir a la superficie.

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas
programme.desc: Cuatro mejores amigos de toda la vida van a Las Vegas para dejar de portarse como adultos de su edad y revivir sus días de gloria. Al llegar, se dan cuenta de que las décadas transformaron Sin City y pusieron a prueba su amistad de manera impensada.

programme.title: Guerra de papás
programme.desc: ¡Will Ferrell y Mark Wahlberg frente a frente en este enfrentamiento entre papá y padrastro! Brad (Ferrell) quiere ser el mejor padrastro para los hijos de su nueva esposa.

programme.title: Un funeral de murte
programme.desc: Esta estrafalaria comedia británica nos muestra con un humor negro azabache la miríada de escandalosas calamidades que asuelan a un excéntrico clan inglés, que guarda unos cuantos muertos en el armario, cuando el patriarca muere inesperadamente.

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas
programme.desc: Cuatro mejores amigos de toda la vida van a Las Vegas para dejar de portarse como adultos de su edad y revivir sus días de gloria. Al llegar, se dan cuenta de que las décadas transformaron Sin City y pusieron a prueba su amistad de manera impensada.

programme.title: Euroviaje
programme.desc: Europa nunca será la misma después de que Scotty Thomas y sus amigos aterrizan para vivir aventuras y excesos, haciendo las cosas más alocadas en el viaje más salvaje de sus vidas!

programme.title: Jay y el silencioso Bob
programme.desc: Hollywood adapta el cómic "Bluntman y Chronic" a la gran pantalla sin el permiso de los íconos drogadictos reales de DEPENDIENTES: Jay y Bob el Silencioso.

programme.title: Jacuzzi al pasado
programme.desc: ¡Prepárese a olvidar el pasado con la versión inapropiada más salvaje del jacuzzi al pasado! Las risas comienzan cuando cuatro amigos comparten una noche en un jacuzzi en un resort de esquí, y se despiertan con una fuerte resaca en 1986.

programme.title: El Crimen del Padre Amaro LAS
programme.desc: La política y las pasiones sexuales amenazan con corromper a un joven sacerdote recién ordenado en un pequeño pueblo mexicano.

programme.title: El Infierno (LAS)
programme.desc: Benny has been deported from the United States back to a Mexico that is being ripped apart by warring drug cartels. He gets involved in the narco business and begins to rocket up through the ranks, and is surrounded by money, women, violence, and fun.

programme.title: Purasangre
programme.desc: Purasangre narra la historia de cómo un equipo de cinco profesionales se ve obligado a robar un famoso hipódromo y casino.

programme.title: Aqui Entre Nos (LAS)
programme.desc: Cansado de ser dado por sentado por su esposa y sus 3 hijas, Rodolfo Guerra se levanta una mañana y decide no ir a trabajar. Entonces comienza la locura.

programme.title: Fuga de la Patagonia
programme.desc: Moreno, es un explorador tomado prisionero y acusado de espionaje. Tras ser condenado a muerte Moreno se da la fuga. Para sobrevivir, Moreno se enfrentará con la naturaleza salvaje. Un territorio sin reglas.

programme.title: El que busca encuentra
programme.desc: Esperanza y Marcos son dos personas que creen en el destino y en el amor verdadero.

programme.title: El caso del diamante navideño
programme.desc: Acusan a una mujer de robar una gema, pero ella buscará al culpable en medio de una letanía de huéspedes ricos.

programme.title: Navidad en Washington
programme.desc: La decoradora Emily consigue el contrato para decorar la embajada de Kalmar para la Navidad. Pero el nuevo embajador Magnus no tiene tiempo para Navidad.

programme.title: Ballet para la Navidad
programme.desc: Cuando la profesora de ballet Olivia elige a Lily para "El Cascanueces", se enamora del padre de Lily, Michael. ¿Podrá Olivia hacer realidad los deseos de todos esta Navidad?

programme.title: Una navidad perfecta para Carol
programme.desc: Cuando una pastelera independiente acepta acompañar al hombre de sus sueños a casa por las fiestas, las cosas se complican rápidamente al verse atrapada en una lucha de poder con la dominante madre de él.

programme.title: Dos bodas y una Navidad
programme.desc: Una novia fugitiva hace una búsqueda espiritual cuando es atrapada por la nieve dentro de una cabaña con su abuela y un viejo romance en Navidad.

programme.title: Regresando a casa en Navidad
programme.desc: Kate tiene la gran idea de reunir para Navidad a su familia separada y volver as antigua casa. El problema es que alguien vive allí y no es muy amable.

programme.title: Un pueblo navideño
programme.desc: Para salvar su reputación, Piper Jensen, un genio en relaciones públicas y dueña de su propia agencia de relaciones públicas, acepta trabajar para el dueño de un Pueblo de Santa en dificultades, ahí descubrirá el amor y cuán mágica es la Navidad.

programme.title: Una estrella en Navidad
programme.desc: Incluso las estrellas se enfrentan a los mismos problemas que los humanos. Un día, la celosa Próxima derriba a la estrella lucero del cielo y ésta aterriza en un pueblo. Lucero sólo tiene unos días para volver al cielo, de lo contrario se extinguirá.

programme.title: El perro que salvó la navidad de vacaciones
programme.desc: Un astuto can y un caniche francés deben salvar su hogar de unos tontos ladrones que atacan durante las vacaciones de Navidad.

programme.title: Chucky el muñeco diabólico
programme.desc: El joven Andy es el único que sabe que su muñeco, Chucky, está poseído por el alma de un asesino y que ha cometido varios crímenes macabros. Pero el verdadero terror empieza cuando Chucky decide transferir su espíritu maligno a un humano... Andy.

programme.title: Encubrimiento
programme.desc: Una policía investiga el asesinato de un compañero y se enfrenta a un espíritu maligno que acosas a los policías de su unidad. Pronto descubre el siniestro secreto sobre el encubrimiento de un tiroteo en contra de un joven desarmado.

programme.title: La conspiración del diablo
programme.desc: Un culto satánico roba la Sábana Santa de Turín para fines malvados.

programme.title: La invitación
programme.desc: En este tenso thriller psicológico de Karyn Kusama, la tensión crece cuando Will asiste a la cena de su exesposa Eden y su nuevo marido, David.

programme.title: Texas: masacre en cadena 2
programme.desc: La familia de psicópatas asesinos más peligrosa vuelve a la carga. Después de secuestrar a la DJ Vantia Block, deben enfrentarse a un policía texano que los persigue.

programme.title: Carrie (2002)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis protagoniza esta adaptación de la clásica historia de terror de Stephen King. Carrie es una chica tímida con poderes telequinéticos y cuando sus torturadores la someten a un acto de humillación, todos aprenderán una lección mortal.

programme.title: Alucinaciones del pasado
programme.desc: Un veterano de la guerra de Vietnam, ahora trabajador del correo de Nueva York, enfrenta recuerdos traumáticos y alucinaciones. Con la ayuda de su nueva novia, lucha para mantenerse sano mientras su mente fluctúa entre la realidad y el delirio.

programme.title: Big Jake
programme.desc: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson and wound his son.

programme.title: The Big Country
programme.desc: Burl Ives earned a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his portrayal of a family patriarch involved in a bitter land feud in this explosive western drama that also features a sumptuous musical score.

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!
programme.desc: James Garner stars in this rollicking western spoof that has him taking on the job of a frontier town sheriff who must fend off villains (led by Walter Brennen) from every direction...all without breaking a sweat or dirtying his shiny black boots!

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter
programme.desc: James Garner is back in the saddle again as hustler Latigo Smith whose latest con is passing off cowhand Jug (Jack Elam) as the dreaded gunman Swifty Morgan. But when the real Swifty shows up, the Wild West is going to get a whole lot wackier!

programme.title: The Iron Sheriff
programme.desc: Sterling Hayden plays a sheriff with continuing moral dilemmas. Should he relate a deathbed confession which falsely implicates his son in a murder? Should he carry out his threat to cold-bloodedly kill the real murderer or bring him to legal justice?

programme.title: Boots And Saddles
programme.desc: A British youngster inherits a ranch so burdened with taxes that he struggles to keep the property. Gene Autry befriends the boy, and becomes involved with an Army colonel's daughter and others.

programme.title: Man from Music Mountain
programme.desc: Singing cowboy Gene Autry and his sidekick Smiley Burnette star in this feature pitting cattle ranchers and real estate speculators. When it appears that there's gold on a ranch; a group of suspicious men begins selling claims in the local community.

programme.title: Blue Montana Skies
programme.desc: Gene Autry heads North to apprehend fur smugglers plundering the trappers' pelts, and then return to the U.S. When the trail leads to the H-H dude ranch owned by a beautiful gal, the action heats up.

programme.title: Against a Crooked Sky
programme.desc: When Charlotte Sutter is kidnapped by Apaches her brother Sam aided by an old drunk prospector goes searching for her.

programme.title: The Bells Of St Mary's
programme.desc: At a big city Catholic school, Father O'Malley and Sister Benedict indulge in friendly rivalry, and succeed in extending the school through the gift of a building.

programme.title: Hatari
programme.desc: Director Howard Hawks reteams with John Wayne, who heads a group of highly skilled professional game hunters in Africa. Only they don’t use bullets – they capture the ferocious big game with strong rope and cameras for zoos and circus attractions.

programme.title: Donovan's Reef
programme.desc: Acclaimed director John Ford and screen legend John Wayne team up for what would be their final collaboration in this boisterous, rowdy South Seas escapade.

programme.title: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: Producer-director Otto Preminger’s epic treatment of the bombing of Pearl Harbor details the devastating attack on the Hawaiian naval base as well as the explosive, behind-the-scenes stories.

programme.title: The Hitch-Hiker
programme.desc: Two fishermen pick up a psychotic escaped convict who tells them that he intends to murder them when the ride is over.

programme.title: Lilies Of The Field
programme.desc: Nominated for 5 Academy Awards® including Best Picture and winner of the Best Actor Oscar® for Sidney Poitier for his role as an itinerant handyman who stops to help five impoverished nuns and the small Arizona desert town in which they reside.

programme.title: G.I. Blues
programme.desc: Elvis adopts an on-screen persona he knows well in real life-a singin' G.I. in West Germany. Eager to open a stateside nightclub after his hitch in khakis, he takes part in a wager to raise the dough he needs.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Vivian's pleasure at Arthur's sudden burst of amorous behavior is overcome by panic when it becomes obvious that Arthur is just not himself.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's anger over Mrs. Naugatuck's sudden strange behavior threatens to end their three-year friendship. Maude fires Mrs. Naugatuck, and insists that she leave immediately, until she finds out that she will never see Mrs. Naugatuck again.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude is furious when she discovers her wallet is missing after an encounter with a West Indian woman in a New York subway. Her fury turns to rage when the woman suddenly shows up at the Findlay house.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Driven by a severe case of guilt, Maude extends a less than sincere invitation to her trying aunt Tinkie, but can't possibly be prepared for the suffering yet to come.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's liberal beliefs are put to test when she insists that Phillip invite his friend Sam to spend the night, only to be confronted by an unexpected situation.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Being president of the Hooterville Phone Company has been a rude awakening for Oliver. The switchboard operator is now calling him at five in the morning! After a bevy of new complaints from unhappy customers, Oliver has just about had enough.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: One might think that when Eb takes a vacation, things around the farm might go more smoothly. But when Eb elopes, leaving his cousin Walter to take his place, it turns out to be a horrible idea. Walter barely knows a weed from a hole in the ground!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa is reminded that she stored a birthday present for Oliver years ago: a genuine Stavinsky. But what is it? It's a modern art sculpture that is two parts plumbing pipes, one part tire chains, and one part birdbath. Oliver calls it The Thing.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The continually evolving story of how Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Oliver) fell in love gets yet another version in this delightful episode. But one thing is for sure: Lisa and Oliver are just as in love today as the day when he fell out of the sky.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Green Acres is greener than ever…with jealousy. When Oliver (Eddie Albert) hires a handsome, young, intelligent Brit to take over his farm work while he is away, it doesn't take long for the newcomer to make a strong impression on Lisa (Eva Gabor).

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Haney is up to his money-making schemes again. When a government representative tells Mr. Haney that the state is looking to purchase the Douglas farm for a new highway, Mr. Haney arranges to buy back the farm from the Douglases at a steal.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Ralph, the lady carpenter, runs away from home and stays with the Douglases after having a fight with her brother, Alf. While Oliver may never get his bedroom finished, he gains a maid as Ralph takes over as the Douglases' live-in housekeeper.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Picking apples while on a picnic, Oliver runs into the feisty Ira Hatch, the owner of the apple orchard. However, once back in town, Mr. Drucker tells Oliver that Hatch has been dead for years. An incredulous Oliver agrees to see a psychologist.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After his elopement and cross-country honeymoon, Eb returns to Hooterville. But his new wife is nowhere to be found! After sending postcards from all across the country, Eb has to confess that his fiancé stood him up at the alter on their big day.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Someone has stolen $300 from Mr. Drucker's general store, and it looks like Eb is the culprit. How else could he have bought himself a new car that cost, you guessed it, exactly $300? But that is just the first twist of the many turns of this story.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The drivers bare their souls, recalling those moments in their lives when fate caused them to detour from the street of dreams down the alley to becoming a cabbie.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: As Elaine nears a decision on her future, the cabbies reminisce about those glorious things that "might have been" had fate not sent them down that treacherous road to the Sunshine Cab Co.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: A UFO has been sighted over Tuckahoe, but no one believes it because it's Maude who's spotted it.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: The liberated woman has no place in society...at least that is what Victoria Butterfield's father professes and Maude protests.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's all-out campaign to get a well-deserved salary raise for one of Walter's female employees backfires when the lady decides to take the raise...and Walter, too. Marcia Rodd guest stars as Walter's overly liberated employee.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: The generation gap becomes the Grand Canyon when Maude agrees to chaperone Phillip's birthday party and comes face to face with today's youth.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Arthur instigates a doctors' strike, refusing to treat 'any' patients, but his convictions could prove to be very unhealthy when Walter and Vivian take ill.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's up to her libido in sexual fantasies over a handsome government ecologist and Walter's up to his ears in jealousy.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: When Edith finds some old lottery tickets, Archie hits the roof claiming she was wasting money. However, Archie's attitude quickly changes when one of the tickets is a winner, but there is a catch: Edith claims the tickets belong to George Jefferson.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: One morning Archie gets up, goes to his front door to get the newspaper and is shocked to discover that someone has painted a swastika on his front door. Archie soon gets into a debate with Mike as to who could have painted it and why.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie comes home in a fantastic mood for a change because he has the chance to possibly join a prestigious bowling team, the Cannonballers. After waiting six years, it seems that there is finally a vacancy on the team and Archie is planning to try out.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie has been suffering from a terrible pain in his back and has become a terrible pain to Edith, who has been waiting on him hand and foot. When the doctor takes a look at him, he orders Archie to be admitted to the hospital for tests.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) suspects a newly arrived short-order cook in town may be involved in the recent murder of a young prostitute. Virgil (Howard Rollins) thinks otherwise and is out to prove that a local criminal is to blame.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil and his wife, Althea, are invited to attend services at an all-white church. While attending the service, the reverend collapses, dead at the foot of the pulpit. It seems that not everyone was happy with the pastor's integration plan.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) is informed that a death row prisoner wants him present at his execution, the chief struggles over whether capital punishment is cruel and unusual punishment or an appropriate sentence for the crime he committed.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Twelve years ago, Joanne (Lois Nettleton) convinced two friends to testify against their pimp for the murder of a prostitute. Now, three convicts escape from prison, and one of them is out for revenge against the women who sent him to prison.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Tragically, a tiny newborn infant is found dead in the Sparta city dump, and more than just the teenage mother is suspect. Virgil (Howard Rollins) tries to unravel the heartbreaking story of a young teenage girl who was left by her baby's father.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Detective Virgil Tibbs investigates a series of elderly citizens that are being beaten and robbed. Things become more complicated as Detective Tibbs in-laws are visiting from Philadelphia trying to get him and his wife to move back home.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Tibbs and Sweet investigate a woman who has been beaten and left for dead on the banks of a local creek. Tibbs, in particular, takes an interest in this possible wife-beating case and, in the process, unlocks part of his difficult and painful past.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Detective Virgil Tibbs and Chief Bill Gillespie investigate a murder of a father of two very different daughters who are caught up in a case of intense sibling rivalry...one that may have led one or both of them to murder.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: When a policeman's wife is murdered, the officer attempts to take the law into his own hands to seek out and execute the killer.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A famous research scientist, duped into believing he shot a man, disappears from his vital government post. Meanwhile, McGarrett's investigation is being hampered by officious help from another arm of the government.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A scientific genius disappears after discovering a biological mutation which is hostile to every form of life on earth.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby, J.R., and Betty investigate a 10 year old kidnapping case after a man identifying himself as Scorpio calls a family offering to return his long lost daughter in exchange for a $250,000 ransom.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: While out on a fishing trip Barnaby and J.R. are asked to investigate the disappearance of a ranch hand after his girlfriend believes he met with foul play.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby suspects foul play following the accidental deaths of a judge and a doctor, who both received alleged phone calls just prior to their demise from a dead woman whom they both helped put into a mental institution years before.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Always trying to help out a friend, Jack Stewart offers his support when a con-man acquaintance tries to straighten out his life. Instead, Jack's entwined in a mysterious fatal car accident investigation involving a posh health spa.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A tense situation erupts into a hotbed of chaos! While awaiting treatment from Dr. Sloan, convicted criminal John Dunbar unexpectedly jumps his guards and seizes a gun.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A devastating earthquake causes widespread damage and Dr. Sloan's hospital goes on emergency power. After the tremors stop, Mark's friend Martin Garfield is found dead in the ruins of his mansion nearby. Was it the earthquake or murder?

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve's undercover waterfront surveillance causes city-wide panic. His suspect, a gangland hit man, has suddenly developed the plague!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Posing as a visiting missionary, Dr. Sloan goes undercover at a convent to reveal the location and contents of a most mysterious package - a parcel that brought its owner to a sudden, untimely death.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's double trouble for Dr. Sloan in this second season premiere. What could be worse than an IRS tax audit?

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While confronting board members about embezzled charity funds, chairman Elton Malone mysteriously keels over dead. And, one by one, all of the suspects also wind up murdered--at each other's funerals!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When Dr. Sloan's wealthy womanizing patient, Robert Stroud, mysteriously disappears, Sloan uncovers a greedy plot hatched by the women in Stroud's life. It's a murderous plan ripe with blackmail and betrayal--and a shockingly twisted conclusion!

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Innocent acceptance of an apparently menial job as a porter at a swank country club, involves Dr. Richard Kimble in a top secret government experiment.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: A cocaine dealer being escorted by an obnoxious detective escapes. Hunter and the detective pursue her, meanwhile, McCall goes undercover to bring down a drug lord.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: The pursuit of the cocaine dealer continues and the plot thickens as Hunter and McCall find their cases colliding.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: The Beach Boy arrives in L.A. from Hawaii and begins to kill local drug dealers. Hunter and McCall have to figure out his next move before another victim is claimed.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Now you see it, now you don't. A despised lawyer turns up murdered at Community General and before the police can arrive, the body mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a tasty tale for the t.v. tabloids when Community General's most famous patient attractive t.v. star, Pamela, is caught on tape fleeing the murder scene of ex-husband number four.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Buzz and Sonja are getting ready for Homecoming, and Vint tells Sonja she has to be home early because she is a girl. When an angry Sonja returns home late, she and Mama have a talk, and Mama defends her rights as a woman.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama runs into an an old flame, Woody Miller, who she is going out to dinner with. After dinner, the two go up to a cabin by the lake, against her family's wishes. She ends up going home the same day to the relief of her family.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Fran and Vint both have big nights which they are nervous about and ask Mama to iron clothes for them. Mama accidentally ruins Fran's dress and forgets to iron Vint's shirt because she isn't paying attention.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Claude comes up with a scheme, telling Vint that he could make nearly two thousand dollars by marrying a woman who needs her green card. Mama tells Vint if discovered, he could be in serious trouble and Vint decides not to do it.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Eunice buys a tape and begins thinking positively. She becomes very cheerful and finally gets a role in a production at the Playhouse. When the show's star, Sally, cuts her lines, Eunice and Sally fight.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Mama discovers the president of the Church Ladies League cannot read—and this is the reason for her mistakes—Mama starts a program in the church to teach adults to read.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: The family hires a psychic whose predictions all come true. But when Mama realizes where she's getting her information, Mama goes into a trance of her own to expose the charlatan.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria comes home from work in a most unusual mood. She later confides in Edith that on the way to work, she had been attacked by a construction worker near a construction site.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Being her time of the month, Gloria is in a complete foul mood and gets into a big argument with Edith, lambasting her for letting Archie boss her around.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike's artist friend, Szabo, is coming to the Bunker's house. Archie is a bit perplexed for two reasons. First, he is Hungarian. The other is that he sketches models in the nude. Szabo gets a great idea that Gloria should pose in the nude for him.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is furious with his houseguest, Cousin Oscar. When they were kids, Oscar bullied Archie and now Oscar is taking full advantage of his visit at the Bunkers. Archie wants to throw him out, but Oscar makes an exit of his own when he turns up dead.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike and Gloria are all excited about their first wedding anniversary and order take-out as a special dinner. Sitting around the dinner table, an argument ensues which leads to Edith recalling the day Archie met Mike.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The family manages to collect $30 in the family pot and an argument ensues when Edith wants to use the money to set her lyrics for a song to music. Meanwhile, Archie is disturbed by robberies in the neighborhood and wants to use the money to buy a gun.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike and Lionel are planning on attending a demonstration at the United Nations. However, the rally gets out of hand and news of it appears on TV. This worries Gloria who begs Archie to go down there and get Mike.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: A local election has the Bunker family in turmoil as Mike and Gloria are all for Claire Packer, a woman, which is why Archie is dead set against her. However, once down at the voting booths, Archie realizes that he can't vote because he isn't registered.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: At the grocery store, Edith has an accident in the parking lot. She loses control of her shopping cart which smashes into a car and a can of Cling Peaches (in heavy syrup) flies out of the cart, onto the car, and makes a dent.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike is all stressed out with upcoming exams leaving him impotent and frustrated. Gloria encourages him to discuss it with her, but he refuses. Gloria confides in Edith what the problem is, and in turn she tells Archie.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Cissy befriends a girl who uses her to disobey her parents. Uncle Bill feels that Buffy and Jody would benefit from listening to fairy tales than watching war-based programs on TV, but the fairy tales end up giving them nightmares.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: While on a job in Rome, Bill falls in love with a much younger woman whom he plans to marry, until learning that she has no desire to share his life with Cissy, Buffy, and Jody.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: After Mr. French is ribbed by his gentlemen peers about also being a nanny, he resigns himself to return to his role as a gentlemen's gentleman and starts to shun the children.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Bill breaks his leg skiing and Buffy, Jody, and Cissy give up all their free time to take care of him. Bill's girlfriend also wants to help him, which he thinks he wants but realizes the children care much more than she does.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Buffy is delighted to go with Uncle Bill to Puerto Rico because she gets to have his full attention. However, Bill meets a former girlfriend and it seems like he may divide his time between the two.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Mike is placed in charge of taking care of the house and his brothers when both Steve and Bub are out of town at the same time. He finds it a challenge, especially when Robbie and his friend go to the hospital after a school accident.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: When the boys continue to ask Bub for help with their homework, he realizes he does not have all the answers. He decides to go to night school for further education. He meets another student, and they both make up stories about their lives.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Chip runs away from home after feeling neglected, but when he gets downtown, he realizes home is safer.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: While on a camping trip vacation without the other family members, Steve is matched to another camper by an older couple who loves to play matchmakers. Both Steve and Fran are initially reluctant.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Mike and Robbie each have dates the same night. Due to a mix up in names, Mike picks up Robbie's young date (Trudi Ames), and Robbie picks up an older woman (Carole Costello), meant for Mike.

programme.desc: Choreographed by Tony Mercer, the Imperial Ice Stars interpret Tchaikovsky's Swan Lake ballet.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A mother is suspected in the murders of two of her daughters when her third daughter finally convinces police to reopen two cold cases.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: With access to the San Francisco Police Department's work, including saliva samples taken from letters the infamous Zodiac Killer sent 30 years ago, we reevaluate the case of the serial killer who began terrorizing California in the late 1960s.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In a city of eight million, landlord Bruce Blackwood disappears without a trace in March 2006. Though there is no body, the NYPD is sure this is a homicide and they spend the next nine years searching for answers.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When a 30-year-old mother fails to report for duty in Virginia, the Army lists her as AWOL. Her family immediately suspects foul play. They embark on a 13-year quest for answers before an eyewitness blows the case wide open.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Nine years after the murders of a mother and her teenage daughters, a wiretapped conversation helps police to crack the case. And the baffling murder of a Virginia woman is solved when human bones are discovered by a geologist in North Carolina.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: When a church deacon is found shot to death it looks like police may have stumbled upon a multi-party murder plot. And, a wife remains a key suspect in her husband's murder case for six years, until she attempts to prove her own innocence.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When 23-year-old Tonya McKinley is found brutally murdered on New Years Day 1985, a little boy is left motherless. A family must wait 35 years for advancements in forensic science to finally catch a killer using familial DNA.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: It takes nine years and the work of cutting-edge forensic toxicologists to solve the murder of a medical examiner's wife. Then, a determined Alabama sheriff reopens the case of the deaths of two babies, hoping to get their mother to confess.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: March 1984. Jack Kennedy discovers his daughters brutally murdered. Their mother and niece spend their lives keeping the case alive. DNA leads nowhere. 30 years later, an informant gives up a name.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: New DNA technology and the national DNA databank help police hunt down a rapist-killer 11 years after he committed his crimes, and a detective's painstaking recreation of a woman's shooting death proves it wasn't an accident.

programme.title: Cold Case Files

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un policía retirado es descubierto en su cama, muerto de una sola herida de bala en la cabeza. Su esposa primero dice que el motivo fue un robo; luego le dice a la policía que se suicidó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompiendo el molde
programme.desc: El hijo de tres años de unos padres de Dripping Springs, Texas, desarrolla una condición respiratoria.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Noticia de última hora
programme.desc: Una joven productora de noticias de televisión es violada y asesinada en su apartamento. La policía identifica a dos sospechosos, pero ambos son absueltos de cualquier delito.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En algún momento durante una fiesta de Navidad en el vecindario, Melissa Brannen, de cinco años, desapareció. Los investigadores recurrieron a la ciencia forense para ayudarlos a ver lo que se perdieron los testigos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray fue acusada de la muerte de su esposo. Su hijo estaba tan convencido de su inocencia que se matriculó en la facultad de derecho, estudió todas las pruebas y, finalmente, descubrió la verdad de lo que realmente sucedió entre sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, un cráneo humano recuperado de un estanque de Ohio revela un crimen espantoso. Las marcas en el cráneo indican que la víctima había sido apuñalada varias veces y que los dientes se le habían extraído con unos alicates de punta delgada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan desafortunado puede ser un hombre? Su esposa se quitó la vida y su novia de la universidad se suicidó de la misma manera catorce años antes. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto era solo una extraña coincidencia o dos asesinatos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, la muerte de Crystal Purcell fue considerada un accidente. Luego en el 2001, Barbara Purcell llamó a la policía para sugerir que su desaparecido esposo había matado a Crystal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una fría noche de Diciembre de 1993, Rose Larner se detuvo en una tienda cuando se dirigía a la casa de su novio. Nunca más se la vio ni se supo de ella.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Este episodio documenta un atentado mortal en una iglesia en Oakwood, Illinois, en diciembre de 1997.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la búsqueda del asesino de dos adolescentes de Texas, un perfil de conducta llevó a sospechar de Jason Massey. La ciencia demostró que el perfil era correcto y Massey fue ejecutado mediante inyección letal el 3 de Abril del 2001.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un saco de dormir desechado, que contiene zapatillas de deporte ensangrentadas y un bolso, lleva a la policía al cuerpo de una mujer joven.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas de Elefante
programme.desc: Los asesinatos de una pareja de ancianos dejan a la policía perpleja hasta que, dos años después, reciben un gran alivio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie andaba suelto y la policía tenía que encontrarlo antes de que atacara nuevamente. Su pista más prometedora era inusual: una huella dactilar sangrienta en el cuerpo de una de las víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1984, los bomberos de California habían combatido diez incendios provocados en tres semanas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Noticia de última hora
programme.desc: Una joven productora de noticias de televisión es violada y asesinada en su apartamento. La policía identifica a dos sospechosos, pero ambos son absueltos de cualquier delito.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía de Seattle no tenía sospechosos en el violento asesinato de la cantante post-grunge, Mia Zapata.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue el accidente automovilístico más mortal en la historia de los Estados Unidos. Casi un centenar de vehículos participaron, doce personas murieron y más de cincuenta resultaron heridas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las zonas rurales de Canadá, el Dr. John Schneeberger es acusado de sedar y agredir sexualmente a una de sus pacientes y a su hijastra. Las pruebas de ADN demuestran que el doctor es inocente, pero la paciente insiste en que la sedó y violó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El caso musical
programme.desc: En 1999, una niña de 12 años fue encontrada asesinada en su casa y cambió la sensación de seguridad que tenían los residentes de la pequeña ciudad de Waseca, Minnesota.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Esta examinación del papel que juegan las autopsias en las investigaciones de asesinatos se centra en la sospechosa muerte de Virginia Ridley.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Laura Houghteling desapareció de su casa en Bethesda y nunca más se la volvió a ver. Los científicos forenses usan evidencia de su habitación para dirigir a la policía hacia un sospechoso principal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la víspera de Navidad de 2005, se encuentra el cuerpo de un hombre ardiendo cerca de Baltimore. Finalmente fue identificado como Wesley Person, de 26 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mark Fair se fue a trabajar y su prometida, Karla Brown, se quedó en casa. Más tarde, la encontró muerta. Durante la autopsia, se volvieron a examinar las marcas de mordeduras en su cuerpo y la odontología forense identificó al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Con un pie en el crimen
programme.desc: El cuerpo descompuesto de una mujer joven fue descubierto en un canal de irrigación de Bakersfield. Si había rastros de evidencia, se había lavado con el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2007, el trailer de Effie y Michael Ratley en Florida se incendia y Michael heroicamente rescata a su esposa e hijo. Un mes después, su esposa es encontrada golpeada hasta la muerte en una habitación de la casa de sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: La coartada
programme.desc: En 1991, una chica de secundaria desaparece después de asistir a una fiesta. El principal sospechoso no tenía a un pero dos testigos que le daban coartada para la noche en que desapareció.

programme.desc: Lacking real family time at home, Jimmy has been spending more and more time at Ashley's house. He and Toby are like brothers and Kate's begun referring to him as her "third kid".

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Recently diagnosed with a learning disorder, an embarrassed Liberty is ashamed to tell her friends about her tutoring sessions. Emma sees one of Liberty's private sessions and, putting two-and-two together with Liberty's suspicious behaviour, asks J.T.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Sean asks Emma what she's doing tonight, Emma's thrilled - that's a date, right? But nervous Sean is unable to muster the courage to arrange the details and Emma misunderstands his hesitancy as rejection.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Paige decides to start a Spirit Squad at Degrassi, Emma can't believe that the "sexist" sport of cheerleading is being revived. But Manny, who's had years of gymnastics training and is desperate for something to help make her "cool"

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley's convinced that she and Terri are going to be the stars of the school talent show, singing her new (and incredibly earnest) ballad. Terri would rather add Paige -- and some fun sparkle -- to the act, but she's not sure how to tell Ashley that.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with the pressure of passing Grade 7 on his second time around and his mother's newest threat to take him back to his unhappy life up north, Sean is beginning to slip into old, angry patterns.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Perfect Ashley is beginning to bore even herself. With their parents away for the weekend, Ashley decides to join Toby in breaking the "one-guest-each" rule and invites Paige and Hazel to join her and Terri.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Spike reveals the identity of the mystery man she's been dating, Emma is shocked. Mr. Simpson - her teacher! Emma claims she’s okay with it, but if that’s true, why is suddenly being so rude to Mr. Simpson?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley feels like an outcast. Nobody's willing to forget how she treated them at her party last year. Ash decides to take action, swallows her pride and apologizes to everyone. And it works. She boasts to Terri about her success- it’s like last year

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's Science Fair time at Degrassi. Emma’s a serious contender for first prize, but when the results of her experiment don't fall in line with her hypothesis, she's in a panic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Joey is going away for the weekend with his latest girlfriend, and Craig is surprised when Joey tells him he can stay on his own – and even have the guys over! When the guys get to Craig’s for the weekend, they can’t think of much to do

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Degrassi Panthers have a new star soccer player, Spinner. His victory’s even sweeter when Paige agrees to a movie. When the losing team's defensive back, the gorgeous Dean, invites a smitten Paige to a house party, she cancels on Spinner.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: For thousands of years, downtown LA hid an indiscriminate killer. In one of the most surprising wildlife crime stories in the world, `Natural World' turns forensic detective to solve the mystery and unmask victims and killers.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: According to new evidence, the Woolly Mammoth went on roaming until about the time the Pyramids were built.

programme.title: Iceman: Mummy From the Stone Age
programme.desc: The discovery of a 5,000-year-old male mummy in the Austrian Alps has enabled scientists to re-create a vanished world.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Dinosaur
programme.desc: David Attenborough tells the story of the discovery and reconstruction in Argentina of the world's largest known dinosaur, a brand new species of titanosaur. Measuring 37m long, it now holds the record as the biggest animal ever to walk the earth.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: The earth split in India 66 million years ago in a disaster that may have caused the end of the dinosaurs.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham is out to determine whether the Himalayan Yeti and the Sumatran Orang Pendek exist.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Richard Miles examines the phenomenon of the Roman Republic, from its fratricidal mythical beginnings, with the legend of Romulus and Remus, to the all too real violence of its end.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: The material benefits of the `good order' delivered by Roman rule provided its citizens and subjects with the security to ask profound questions about the meaning of life, questions that the Roman belief system was ill-equipped to answer.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Both Light and Control emerge from their respective slumbers...

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Ace realizes that her past actions need to be dealt with.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: When Barbara meets the Aztecs they mistake her for a reincarnation of the High Priest.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Barbara's divine powers are challenged and she humiliates Tlotoxl.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Can the Doctor and his companions escape before they are sacrificed to the Sun God?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.desc: Steven and Vicki discover an atomic bazooka.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Discovering the Monk's plan, the Doctor is determined to stop him meddling.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor is forced to use the emergency unit, removing them from time space dimension!

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Zoe, Jamie and the Doctor are transported to a puzzling world where they are confronted by riddles.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
